videoDetails.title: Minor Mayhem: The Hackers of Gen Z - Part 1
videoDetails.shortDescription:
The young hacker behind a historic breach speaks out for the first time, just days before heading to prison, as experts worry about a new generation of tech-savvy teenagers falling into cybercrime.

Subscribe to ABC News on YouTube: https://abcnews.visitlink.me/59aJ1G
